recommendations.title: Atlas
recommendations.overview: A brilliant counterterrorism analyst with a deep distrust of AI discovers it might be her only hope when a mission to capture a renegade robot goes awry.

recommendations.title: Incarnate
recommendations.overview: An exorcist comes up against an evil from his past when he uses his skills to enter the mind of a nine year old boy.

recommendations.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
recommendations.overview: Sean Anderson partners with his mom's boyfriend on a mission to find his grandfather, who is thought to be missing on a mythical island.

recommendations.title: Cats & Dogs: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
recommendations.overview: The ongoing war between the canine and feline species is put on hold when they join forces to thwart a rogue cat spy with her own sinister plans for conquest.

recommendations.title: The Quake
recommendations.overview: A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake strikes Oslo, Norway.

recommendations.title: Rampage
recommendations.overview: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, the extraordinarily intelligent, silverback gorilla who has been in his care since birth.  But a rogue genetic experiment gone awry mutates this gentle ape into a raging creature of eno

recommendations.title: Badland Hunters
recommendations.overview: After a deadly earthquake turns Seoul into a lawless badland, a fearless huntsman springs into action to rescue a teenager abducted by a mad doctor.

recommendations.title: Pandora
recommendations.overview: When an earthquake hits a Korean village housing a run-down nuclear power plant, a man risks his life to save the country from imminent disaster.

recommendations.title: OMG: Oh My God!
recommendations.overview: A shopkeeper takes God to court when his shop is destroyed by an earthquake.

recommendations.title: The Gods Must Be Crazy II
recommendations.overview: Xixo is back again. This time, his children accidentally stow away on a fast-moving poachers' truck, unable to get off, and Xixo sets out to rescue them. Along the way, he encounters a couple of soldiers trying to capture each other and a pilot and p
